title: pcr_read accepts index > 23 — silent protocol violation
description: Device::pcr_read takes index: u8 and passes it directly to wolfTPM2_ReadPCR as c_int::from(index). TPM spec defines SHA-256 PCR indices 0-23. Index values 24-255 are not valid SHA-256 bank indices. wolfTPM2_ReadPCR will forward the call to the TPM, which will return TPM_RC_VALUE or similar. The caller receives an opaque TpmRc error with no indication that the index was out of range. A pre-check returning Error::InvalidArg('PCR index must be 0-23') before the FFI call would give a better error message and prevent a useless round-trip to the TPM.
